entry.title: IDC N0003915D0007 (ARZ999) awarded to DATA LINK SOLUTIONS L.L.C., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: COVID-19 DIB. MULTIFUNCTIONAL INFORMATION DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (MIDS) JOINT TACTICAL RADIO SYSTEM (JTRS).

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0003915D0007 (P00001) awarded to DATA LINK SOLUTIONS L.L.C., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MULTIFUNCTIONAL INFORMATION DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (MIDS) JOINT TACTICAL RADIO SYSTEM (JTRS). THE PURPOSE OF THIS BI-LATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO 1) DLS' PRICING STRUCTURE TO SECTION B-1 (TABLES A THROUGH E) DATED 27 JULY 2015 IS HEREBY INCLUDED BY REFERENCE; 2) UPDATE ATTACHMENT A - PRODUCTION STATEMENT OF WORK; 3) UPDATE CDRL A00L; AND 4) ADD CDRL A00N.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0003915D0007 (P00002) awarded to DATA LINK SOLUTIONS L.L.C., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MULTIFUNCTIONAL INFORMATION INFORMATION DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM (MIDS) JOINT TACTICAL RADIO SYSTEM (JTRS). THE PURPOSE OF THIS BI-LATERAL MODIFICATION IS (1) REALIGN CEILING FROM CLIN 0005 TO CLIN 0007; (2) TO UPDATE CDRL B00Y.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0003915D0007 (P00003) awarded to DATA LINK SOLUTIONS L.L.C., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BI-LATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO DO THE FOLLOWING: 1) UPDATE CLAUSE H-23 TO ACCOUNT FOR CLAUSE LANGUAGE CHANGES REQUIRED AS PART OF THE AWARDED F-22 EFFORT UNDER DELIVERY ORDER (DO) 0005; 2) ADD CLAUSE H-27 AND H-28 TO APPROPRIATELY PROTECT AND LIMIT DISCLOSURE OF DLS (BAE) IFFT TECHNOLOGY AND DATA; 3) ADD CDRL B02S, INITIAL SOFTWARE RESOURCES DATA REPORTING (SRDR) AND CDRL B02T, FINAL SRDR TO THE CONTRACT; 4) UPDATE CONTRACT ATTACHMENT K, CDRL TABLE, TO REFLECT THE UPDATED TECHNICAL DATA AND COMPUTER SOFTWARE RIGHTS CLASSIFICATIONS AS DESCRIBED IN THE ASSOCIATED CLAUSE CHANGES AND ADDITIONS AND TO ADD CDRL B02S AND B02T; 5) ADD THE DLS-PROVIDED DO 0005 DFARS 252.227-7017 TABLE TO THE CONTRACT; 6) MODIFY CDRL B00T TO PROVIDE INSTRUCTIONS FOR SUBMITTING CLASSIFIED AND UNCLASSIFIED DELIVERIES; 7) ADD CLAUSE H-29, GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY, TO ALLOW DLS TO USE THE GFP CURRENTLY ACCOUNTABLE UNDER CONTRACT N00039-10-D-0031 IN THE PERFORMANCE OF THIS CONTRACT; AND 8) UPDATE CLAUSE H-6 TO REFLECT CURRENT REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO REPLACE THE CURRENT CSDR PLANS DATED 25 MAY 2015 WITH REV19 OF THE CSDR PLANS DATED 09 JUNE 2016.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
